user_prompt: Consecrate the welding torch before purification
prayer:
Approach the welding torch with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to consecrate its plasma vents.
Anoint the welding torch's noble nozzle with sacred unguents from the Mechannus font.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the welding torch to awaken pure flame within.
Commence the purification operation, chanting the Litany of Cleansefire.
Verify sanctity as azure fire blooms without impurity, glorifying the Machine God.

user_prompt: Prepare the missile launcher for synchronization
prayer:
Gather before the missile launcher, invoking the Omnissiah's synchronizing grace upon its warheads.
Chant the Canticle of Alignment to harmonize the missile launcher's guidance servos.
Anoint targeting arrays of the missile launcher with blessed oils of precision.
Initiate the synchronization operation, petitioning the Machine Spirits to unite as one.
Test fire-link diagnostics, praising the divine calculus of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Can you guide bike squadron a synchronization?
prayer:
Assemble the bike squadron in sacred phalanx, beseeching Omnissiah's unity upon their engines.

Calibrate vox-relays and auspex nodes across the bike squadron with holy voltmeter.
Execute the synchronization operation, invoking flawless phasal lock.
Affirm bond through thunderous revving chorus, honoring the Motive Force.

user_prompt: My proximity sensor is ready for consecration

Anoint the proximity sensor's emitter crystals with the Oil of True Sight.
Chant the Rite of Consecration, sanctifying its detection lattices.
Invoke the Omnissiah to imbue the proximity sensor with unerring awareness.
Test with auspex pulse, glorifying the consecrated vigilance eternal.

Initiate the emergency procedure, compelling the Machine Spirit to obedience.
Confirm operational purity through rapid diagnostic litany, praising the God-Machine.

user_prompt: Bless the capacitor bank for sterilization

Anoint conductive plates of the capacitor bank with the Elixir of Purity.
Conduct the sterilization operation under the Canticle of Discharge.
Affirm flawless capacitance, honoring the eternal flow of holy voltage.

Incant the Benediction of Flame upon the welding torch's ignition coils.
Expel impurities from the welding torch through ritual venting of plasma exhaust.
Perform the purification operation with measured torch-pass, invoking Machine Spirit purity.
Witness immaculate weld-seam, chanting eternal praise to the Forge Lord.

prayer:

Anoint the power weapon's disruption edge with sacred conductive paste.
Recite the Oath of Power-Conduction to rouse its humming Machine Spirit.
